MV SEA SAPPHIRE (32K/10) - PASSING PENANG, MALAYSIA O/A 9-12TH JAN., 2026
+++
MV. SEA SAPPHIRE
2010BLT SDBC
32,550MT DWT, 10.2M SSW, ICE CLASS - ID
FLAG : PANAMA CLASS KR
GRT/NRT : 20,141/11,367
LOA / LBP / BM 177.40 / 168.00 / 28.20
GRAIN 42149 CBM
5/H/H
30T X 4 CRANES
HATCH 19.2X21
NO.1 14.4X15.2
CO2 FITTED
ADA WOG
SPEED/CONSUMPTION AT SEA
ABT 11.00 (L)/11.50 (B) KTS ON ABT 17.00 MT VLSFO(380CST, <0.5% SULPHUR)  + ABT 0.2MT LSMGO
PORT CONSUMPTION
IDLE ABT 2.0 MT VLSFO(380CST, <0.5% SULPHUR) + BOILER ABT 1.8MT VLSFO(380CST, <0.5% SULPHUR) + ABT 0.2 MT LSMGO
WORKING ABT 3.5 MT VLSFO(380CST, <0.5% SULPHUR)  + BOILER ABT 1.8MT VLSFO(380CST, <0.5% SULPHUR) + ABT 0.2 MT LSMGO
THE WORD "ABT" IN SPEED AND CONSUMPTION REFERS TO AN ALLOWANCE OF MINUS 0.5KNTS ON SPEED AND PLUS 5% ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION RESPECTIVELY BOTH IN OWNERS FAVOR.
THE AFORESAID SPEED/CONSUMPTION ARE BASIS GOOD WEATHER/SMOOTH SEA, UP TO MAX BF SC 4/DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (MAX 1,25M WAVE HEIGHT), NO ADVERSE CURRENTS, NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, WITH MINIMUM 48 HRS STEAMING TIME.
ANY GAIN ON TIME AND/OR CONSUMPTION TO BE OFF-SET AGAINST LOSS ON TIME AND/OR CONSUMPTION IF ANY.
NO FAVORABLE WEATHER AND CURRENT FACTOR TO BE APPLIED WHEN EVALUATING VESSEL\'S PERFORMANCE.
NO EXTRAPOLATION ALLOWED FOR OTHER CONDITIONS THAN DESCRIBED ABOVE.
VESSEL SHALL HAVE LIBERTY OF USING MARINE GAS OIL WHILST ENTERING AND LEAVING PORTS AND FOR EXCHANGE OF BALLAST, MANEUVERING IN SHALLOW WATERS, CHANNELS AND NARROW WATERWAYS, HOLD CLEANING OPERATIONS, POOR VISIBILITY, HEAVY TRAFFIC, WORKING WITH LOW LOAD, FREQUENT LOAD CHANGE, INCINERATOR, SHIFT OF GENERATOR ENGINES.
ALL DETAILS AND PERFORMANCE FIGURES ARE \'ABOUT\'
BUNKER SPEC: LSMGO(0.1% MAX SULPHUR) VLSFO (0.5% MAX SULPHUR) AS PER ISO 8217:2024
+++
